text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been invited to a tea party at the Mejiro
manor. When I arrive, though, there seems to be
something amiss about Mejiro Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
As an Umamusume of the Mejiro family, I must endure
this tea party...

text_block_list.name: Middle-Aged Mejiro Lady
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't cute little Bright! Your timing's
perfect! I was just about to go into the kitchen
and whip up some good old-fashioned brownies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Like the brownies you made back then?!

text_block_list.name: Middle-Aged Mejiro Lady
text_block_list.text:
The very same. Why, I remember when you and
Ryan gobbled them down by the plateful. How
many would you like?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
As tempting an offer as that is, I feel that perhaps
I should limit myself to tea for today.

text_block_list.name: Middle-Aged Mejiro Lady
text_block_list.text:
I suppose you do have your races to consider,
don't you? Some other time, then! Now, who
haven't I asked yet?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I thought it prudent to take a page out of
McQueen's book.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
"As an Umamusume of the Mejiro family, I can ill
afford not to look the part." I saw her repeating
that to herself in the mirror, without ever
breaking eye contact.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And I hold McQueen in the highest esteem.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I thought it would be wrong of me to give in to
my sweet tooth.
choice_data_list:
In that case, we should savor the tea to the
fullest.
Come on, let's have something sweet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes! ♪ Your very presence is empowering,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I must strive to develop an unwavering
determination, just like McQueen! ♪

text_block_list.name: Middle-Aged Mejiro Lady
text_block_list.text:
Here you are, Little Miss McQueen. Two brownies
just for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you, but... I really must respectfully
decline...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the Mejiro family enjoys their tea party.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, I beg your pardon, but as I just said, I shall
be adopting McQueen's own intentions as—
choice_data_list: But I thought you were Mejiro Bright?
But I thought you were Mejiro Bright?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Point taken.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Mindless imitation is for the likes of young
children.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I should be learning from her in other ways.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me while I go to the kitchen. I'll be sure to
bring some back for you as well, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Bright fully enjoys her tasty trip
down memory lane!
